description: On the league's trade deadline day, an administrator must process all last-minute trades before the cutoff time.

nodes.task_description: Monitor the incoming trade submissions from teams.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent sees a high volume of trades being submitted.

nodes.task_description: For each trade, verify that it is compliant with all league rules (e.g., salary cap, roster limits).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent reviews each trade and flags one that is non-compliant.

nodes.task_description: Approve all compliant trades and notify the non-compliant team of the issue.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent approves valid trades and informs the other team why their trade was rejected.

nodes.task_description: At the deadline, officially close the trade window.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent closes the system to any new trade submissions.
